security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: https:; media-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Turn scattered inspiration into finished creative work.
bundle.longDescription: Regex is a local-first capture-to-production pipeline for creative work: save sparks of inspiration with the note that matters, develop them, and break down committed ideas into reusable assets.
